goal: Navigate to https://kfcvietnam.com.vn/vi/menu to complete the goal: Crawl the COMPLETE KFC Vietnam menu. On the menu page there is a category navigation (categories like: Ưu Đãi / Hot Deals, Món Mới, Combo 1 Người, Combo Nhóm, Gà Rán - Gà Quay, Burger - Cơm - Mì Ý, Thức Ăn Nhẹ, Thức Uống & Tráng Miệng). Visit EVERY category tab one by one and collect EVERY product listed: exact Vietnamese name, displayed price, description text if any, the category name it is listed under, and the product image URL (absolute URL). Scroll each category fully so no item is missed. Return ALL items across ALL categories in the items array — expect roughly 60-110 items total. Do not skip any category.
